obligations.rule: Targets uncovered statement at line 50 where display names with illegal characters not enclosed in quotes are rejected.
obligations.why: The condition `display_name_without_quotes === display_name` evaluates to true, triggering the return statement.

obligations.rule: Targets uncovered statement at line 93 where overly long email strings are rejected when `ignore_max_length` is false.
obligations.why: The condition `!options.ignore_max_length && str.length > defaultMaxEmailLength` evaluates to true, triggering the return statement.
